creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 193845
more diffs

hi Romain

as mentioned on IRC +1 for committing your patch in preference to mine. I'm OOO for the next 10 days, so please go ahead without me.

Just if you can change the maintainer email to dch@FreeBSD.org on the way past, that would be great. I wonder if, when my BZ accounts were merged, if this somehow broke maintainer email?

BTW there is a reason for preferring IPv4 stack in Java, see https://github.com/riemann/riemann-dash/issues/11 for the background. It's pretty old now and it may be that the java dependencies in riemann have resolved this issue. I can't look into this until mid June, but the link above should help see if this is still necessary.
